'''''Dark Forces Manual: Coded Transmissions''''' was the game manual included in all boxed copies of ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''. It included the [[in-universe]] "[[Coded Transmission: Jan Ors to Mon Mothma]]."

{{Game-stub}}
